analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet lists concrete EU measures to counter terrorism (cut financing, counter organized crime, address radicalization, strengthen borders, improve police/judicial cooperation) and invites readers to discover more EU actions. Evaluation: EU1 (successful story): Not directly; no reference to history or overcoming past obstacles. EU2 (united): Not explicit; no mention of unity or agreements among member states. EU3 (useful for its citizens): Yes. It highlights practical, proactive EU policies addressing citizens’ security concerns within the EU, showing tangible measures. EU4 (avant-garde): Not applicable; no claim of pioneering leadership or innovation. EU5 (global champion of fair causes): Not relevant; focuses on security, not rights advocacy. EU6 (contributes to a better world): Not explicit; focus appears internal rather than global cooperation. Conclusion: The tweet promotes EU3.
